case_title: MEGHAN CAROZZA VS. AMBER ZALIMENI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100037389)
